_comment: xstockstrat-agent MCP configuration for Claude.ai / Claude Desktop.
_usage: Paste the relevant block into your Claude Desktop config or Claude.ai MCP settings.

xstockstrat-stdio._mode: stdio -- run locally outside Docker (recommended for Claude Desktop)

xstockstrat-sse-nginx._mode: SSE via nginx (port 80) -- requires API key auth via Authorization header
xstockstrat-sse-nginx._note: Claude Desktop and Claude.ai do not currently support custom headers for SSE connections. Use xstockstrat-stdio or xstockstrat-sse-direct for local development.

xstockstrat-sse-direct._mode: SSE direct to agent container -- bypasses nginx auth gate (local dev only)
